result:
# Introducing Smart Drafts: Never Face a Blank Page Again

We've all been there. You open a new doc, stare at the blinking cursor, and suddenly remember three errands you've been putting off. The blank page is one of the oldest productivity killers in knowledge work, and it's the reason we built **Smart Drafts**, now rolling out to every workspace this week. Our goal was simple: take the friction out of that first sentence so you can get to the thinking that actually matters.

Smart Drafts turns your document title and recent context into a tailored outline with a single click. When you create a new doc, you'll see a new **Suggest an outline** button in the toolbar — give it a title, hit the button, and you'll get a structured draft that reflects how you and your team already work: pulling from related docs you've touched recently, matching the shape of similar documents in your workspace, and leaving clear placeholders for the details only you can fill in. It's not trying to write the doc for you. It's trying to get you to the middle, faster.

This is the first step in a broader push to make our editor feel less like a blank canvas and more like a thinking partner. Next up is **custom voice training**, which will let Smart Drafts learn the rhythms of how your team actually writes — so outlines for a product spec feel different from outlines for a customer update. We'll have more to share on that in the coming weeks. In the meantime, give Smart Drafts a try on your next doc, and let us know what you'd like to see it do next. As always, we're building this with you.

Our goal was simple: take the friction out of that first sentence so you can get to the thinking that actually matters.

It's not trying to write the doc for you. It's trying to get you to the middle, faster.

Next up is **custom voice training**, which will let Smart Drafts learn the rhythms of how your team actually writes — so outlines for a product spec feel different from outlines for a customer update. As always, we're building this with you.
